en-US.summary: Securely control your local OpenClaw Gateway.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask ai claw to check my emails
Alexa, ask ai claw to summarize the news
Alexa, ask ai claw what servers are running
en-US.name: AI Claw
en-US.description: An open source bridge connecting your local autonomous OpenClaw AI gateway to Alexa via secure tunneling.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Skill is open source, personal use only.
